routes.error_model: 404 debug_disabled or route-specific network diagnostic error
routes.truth_boundary: Network peer diagnostics are not generic public state snapshots.

routes.error_model: standard_api_error_envelope; 404 relay_disabled; 400 invalid relay ack; 403 unauthorized relay ack
routes.truth_boundary: Relay ACK is transport-only queue mutation and requires signed recipient authorization in production.
Relay fetch is a node/observer transport queue read with route-specific authority and cursor/replay semantics, not generic public state.
Relay fetch POST is a node/observer transport queue interaction with route-specific authority and replay/cursor semantics.
Relay status is a transport diagnostic and grants no observer, validator, or consensus authority.
Relay submit stores transport envelopes only. It does not submit chain transactions or grant consensus authority.

routes.error_model: standard_api_error_envelope; operator token/observer edge route-specific failures
routes.truth_boundary: Observer reconcile is transport/status bookkeeping and grants no validator authority.
Observer edge status is diagnostic posture/status for the observer edge path and grants no validator or mutation authority.

routes.error_model: standard_api_error_envelope; operator token/observer edge route-specific failures
routes.truth_boundary: Observer tx queue drain is operator/observer transport handling and grants no block production or validation authority.
Async PoH case reads are public commitment read models with restricted identity evidence included only for authorized applicant or assigned reviewer sessions.
Async PoH video upload is an env-gated intake helper. It returns a CID/commitment but does not verify humanity, sign transactions, or write consensus state.
Async PoH juror-cases is reviewer-scoped and requires a valid account session.
Async PoH my-cases is viewer-scoped and requires a valid account session.
PoH async juror accept skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.
PoH async juror decline skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.
PoH async review skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.
Returns a POH_CHALLENGE_OPEN tx skeleton only. Clients must sign and submit through /v1/tx/submit; the skeleton route grants no PoH status or system authority.
Live assigned cases are reviewer-scoped queue reads, not generic public snapshots.
Live PoH case reads expose commitment/status metadata only and must not expose raw room URLs, raw media, or restricted identity evidence.
Live juror-cases is a reviewer-scoped alias and requires authenticated viewer alignment.
Live my-cases is account-scoped and requires authenticated viewer alignment.
Live session reads expose chain-derived commitments only. They never return raw relay URLs or authority to join as a participant.
Live participants read exposes chain-derived participant status only and no media/signaling secrets.
Live presence is node-local transport-only data and is participant-scoped; chain authority still comes from signed attendance/verdict/finalize txs.
Presence updates are participant-scoped transport hints only and do not create attendance, verdict, or finalization authority.
WebRTC signal reads are live-session participant scoped and must not be indexed as generic public snapshots.
WebRTC signal writes are participant-scoped transport messages, not public state mutations.
Bridge imports are cross-node rehearsal transport records; not a public write surface.
Live session list exposes commitment/status metadata only and does not grant room participation authority.
PoH Live attendance skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.
PoH Live juror accept skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.
PoH Live juror decline skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.
PoH Live request skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.
PoH Live verdict skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.
Relay config may expose non-secret connection hints only. It does not grant signaling, room, reviewer, or consensus authority.
WebRTC diagnostics are operator-gated transport diagnostics and must not be indexed as public read snapshots.
WebRTC tx queue drain is operator-gated transport queue handling, not public state and not consensus mutation.

routes.error_model: 404 operator_poh_disabled unless WEALL_ENABLE_OPERATOR_POH=true; 403 operator_token_required/operator_token_invalid unless X-WeAll-Operator-Token matches; standard_api_error_envelope for bad request
routes.rate_limit_policy: global_api_rate_limit_and_request_size_middleware; operator token and env gate required before enqueue
routes.truth_boundary: PoH operator routes are environment-disabled and operator-token gated. They enqueue deterministic system txs only and do not grant public validator authority, public PoH finalization authority, or decentralized reviewer consensus by themselves.

routes.error_model: 404 operator_poh_disabled unless WEALL_ENABLE_OPERATOR_POH=true; 403 operator_token_required/operator_token_invalid unless X-WeAll-Operator-Token matches; standard_api_error_envelope for bad request

Tier-2 juror-cases is reviewer-scoped and requires a valid account session.
Tier-2 my-cases is viewer-scoped and requires a valid account session.
PoH Tier-2 request skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.
Tier-2 PoH video upload is an env-gated intake helper. It returns a CID/commitment but does not verify humanity, sign transactions, or write consensus state.
